transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Riverbend Health Navigation, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Nolan. Something came up on Thursday.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: No problem. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your file?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Marcus Webb, born March 9th, 1985.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Marcus. I see your appointment Thursday at 2 PM with Dr. Nolan for a follow-up. What day works better for you?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Could we do the following Monday, maybe in the morning?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me check. I have Monday the 14th at 9:30 AM or 11 AM open with Dr. Nolan.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect, I've moved your appointment to Monday the 14th at 9:30 AM. You'll get a confirmation text shortly.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Marcus. Anything else I can help with today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's all. Have a good one.
